Localization.Description: Suspicious logon to TeamCity. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to TeamCity on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to TeamCity on host {event_src.host}
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to TeamCity on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
